compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Document in the README that the on-disk ticket store (the `tickets` orphan branch / `.tickets-tracker/`) is **not** intended to be human-readable: events are append-only files, not stored in order, and require the reducer to compute current state. Direct readers should use `rebar` commands. Add a synthetic, illustrative sample event-log JSONL and link it from the README.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [x] README has a section explaining the store is machine-format / not human-readable, ordering is by HLC filename + reducer-computed, view via rebar commands.
- [x] A sample event-log JSONL committed under docs/ and linked from the README.
- [x] Sample is synthetic, faithful to the real event body schema, and demonstrates core features (create/claim/comment/link/tag/transition/sign) clearly and amusingly.

## Out of scope (tracked separately)
The follow-up plan to make the worktree symlink dir + tickets branch name configurable is captured as its own epic, 7c02-554a-330b-4083 (linked discovered_from this ticket), and proposed to the user.
compiled_state.title: README: document the ticket store is not human-readable + add a sample event-log JSONL
